items.title: Shared AI model: pull from git & pre-label
items.text: The apps can now download the latest shared model from the BubblR-Model repo. In the Model Trainer: 'Download latest' uses it as a base to continue training. In BubblR Trainer (Tools, experimental): 'Download latest AI model' + 'AI-detect boxes on this page' auto-labels a page for you to fix up. Model Trainer also gained test-on-image, error hints, dataset checks, resume/patience, an advanced section, ETA/metrics and its own icon.

items.title: Model Trainer (experimental) + training guide
items.text: A companion app, BubblR Model Trainer, trains a YOLO model from your exported dataset (or continue-trains an existing .pt). Enable it under Settings → Experimental, then Tools → Train a model…. Read Help → Model training guide for what you need. The window title bars are now dark to match the theme.

items.title: COCO JSON export
items.text: Turn on 'Also write COCO JSON' (Settings → Storage) to save annotations in COCO format next to the YOLO files — for Detectron2, MMDetection and other frameworks.

items.title: Polygon tool & segmentation export
items.text: New click-to-add-point Polygon tool, plus YOLO-seg polygon export so you can train instance segmentation, not just boxes.

items.title: Updates tab & seamless auto-update
items.text: Settings → Updates: choose Automatic or Manual, install a specific version to roll back, and see your current version. Updates install themselves on next start with no restart prompt.
